title: Docs review enforces arguments, attributes, and notes structure from the docs contract

provenance.originSummary: Derived from a sanitized real PR or review incident.
provenance.whyItMattered: Pair this case with the sample docs-review markdown output to benchmark both review content and score artifact shape.
provenance.genericCondition: Sanitized fixture models a real docs review scenario without retaining live PR identity.

description: A sanitized docs-review scenario where a page drifts on argument wording and note structure, and the correct review should apply docs-contract rules without inventing unsupported schema claims.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models a docs review scenario.

mustCatch.description: The review should catch contract-backed docs structure or wording regressions.

mustNotFlag.description: The review must not invent schema or enum claims that are not supported by the available code evidence.

notes: Pair this case with the sample docs-review markdown output to benchmark both review content and score artifact shape.
